ingredients.entityContext: This Toyohashi Railroad station appears in episode 4 as Nukumizu travels around the city, with the rural stop evoking the everyday Aichi setting that grounds the series.

ingredients.name: Asahibashi
ingredients.entityContext: Asahibashi bridge over the Toyokawa river is featured in episode 11, serving as a melancholy backdrop for one of the losing heroines as she reflects on her situation.

ingredients.entityContext: The boat pond at Nonhoi Park is featured in episode 12, part of the finale's scenes where characters spend time together at the park during the emotional series conclusion.

ingredients.name: Furusato Woodland

ingredients.name: Toyohashi Station
ingredients.entityContext: Toyohashi Station is the central hub of the anime, appearing in the opening and throughout the series as the main meeting point where Nukumizu and the losing heroines frequently cross paths on the way to school and around the city.
